purpose: Record HKJC B+ route verification after PR-135 without promoting records. This file is not a calendar input.

official_sources.fixture_source_role: Confirms June 2026 HKJC meeting dates and racecourses.
official_sources.racecard_source_role: Exposes race-level start times for the selected/current meeting. It must be made date-addressable before B+ promotion.

route_assessment.reason_not_promotion_ready: Racecard pages expose race-level times for selected/current meetings, but PR-136 does not yet prove a reusable date-addressable June 2026 route for every captured meeting.
required_before_promotion: Find stable date-addressable racecard URL or payload for each June 2026 HKJC meeting.
Capture race_number and race_time for every race in the meeting.
Derive first_race_time from the first captured race_time only after all race rows are source-verified.
Derive last_race_time from the final captured race_time only after all race rows are source-verified.
Store time_source_url and time_zone with every promoted B/B+ record.

promotion_decision.last_race_time_definition: Final race start time, not meeting_end_time.

next_steps: Inspect HKJC racecard network requests or date query parameters.
Create a small fixture snapshot for one June 2026 meeting only after stable date addressing is proven.
Then add B+ fields to HKJC records in a separate data-promotion PR.
